description: First, the Spearman’s rank correlation coefficients and their corresponding P-values between the two sets of variables were calculated using the rcorr() function from the Hmisc package (version 5.2.3) in R. Subsequently, the correlation matrix was visualized using the pheatmap package (version 1.0.13). Statistical significance was indicated as follows: p < 0.05 (*), p < 0.01 (**).
